turn.content: N-no, no, no, no... this can't be happening. Oh my god, ten minutes? How can... how can we choose? I don't know you! There's my wife, Susan, and my dog, Rufus...
What's your problem, pal? You're worried about your dog? Your wife? You think this has anything to do with you?! Just let me go!
No, please! Listen to me! I don't want to die! What about us? We can figure this out, together? Please, don't die too! Who... who are you?
Dental assistant... my name's Kaelie... don't you get it? This isn't some game, it's real! You're not thinking, you're just panicking! Calm down! Think about what we need to do!
Think? Think about what?! You're trying to stay alive too! We have to... we have to get out of here! I have kids... little ones, they need me...
The door's probably locked! There are bars! It's not even a possibility! We're stuck here!
What... what do you mean? You think it's impossible? I have to see my kids again! My girls, Emily and... and Sophia! They depend on me!

message: Run failed (gen 1, variant 0) — Groq returned an error or the model is unavailable.
